channel.title: Serenity News Briefing
channel.description: Curated news briefings — Iran/war, AI/ML, fintech, NYC politics.

item.title: 🚨 US Submarine Torpedoed Iranian Warship — First Direct Naval Engagement
item.description:
US Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth confirms US submarine sank Iranian warship in Indian Ocean with torpedo. ~140 crew missing. First direct US-Iran naval engagement in this conflict. Combined with apparent Khamenei succession (supreme leader targeting mission likely succeeded), conflict enters new phase. Pentagon press conference ongoing.

Source: BBC News LIVE. 2026-03-05.

item.title: Israel "Broad Wave" Strikes; Trump "Time to Make a Deal"; Iranian Navy Ship Sinks
item.description: Israel launches fresh broad wave of strikes on Iran. Trump calls for deal. Iranian navy ship sinks off Sri Lanka (~140 missing — now confirmed as US torpedo). NATO involved: Turkey shoots down Iranian missile. Iran strikes expand to Saudi Arabia, Kuwait. 6 US F-15s downed by Kuwaiti friendly fire. 9 killed in Beit Shemesh, Israel. 8 countries now involved.

item.title: March 4: Iran 1,000+ Dead; Tehran HQ Hit; Markets Tumble
item.description: Israel attacks Tehran security HQ. Iran retaliates on US sites in Dubai/Qatar. Civilian toll passes 1,000. 6 US KIA identified. Strait of Hormuz standoff. Markets slump day 3.

item.title: March 3: US-Israel Strikes on Iran Begin
item.description: US-Israel launch coordinated strikes. Civilian toll climbs to 787+. First US combat deaths in Kuwait. Gulf states hit by retaliation.
